analysis.interpretation: The 28 spurious 01/10 counts (2.73%) are the noise signature — they would be 0 in a noiseless Bell state. This is single-circuit measurement noise on Heron r2; the noise grows roughly linearly with two-qubit-gate depth, which is why VQE on noisy hardware is challenging.

retention_note: IBM Open plan typically retains job records for ~30 days. After roughly 2026-06-26, the job_id above may no longer be retrievable from the IBM job archive. The raw_counts in this file are the durable record of the experiment.
reproduce: See notebooks/01_hello_quantum.ipynb. Set IBM_QUANTUM_TOKEN env var, then run cells 1-5. The least-busy backend and shot counts will differ slightly on each run; the qualitative signature (high 00/11, low 01/10) will be the same.
